title: Billie Eilisch speaks out after winning Song Of The Year Grammy for 'Wildflower'
text:
Billie Eilsch's Grammy Victory Statement

Song of the Year Winner: "Wildflower" from her album Hit Me Hard and Soft

Key Quote from Her Speech: "No one is illegal on stolen land. We just need to keep fighting and speaking up and protesting, and our voices really do matter."

Context: Eilsch delivered her acceptance speech at the 68th Grammy Awards on February 1, 2026, in Los Angeles. Alongside her brother Finneas, she used the platform to criticize ICE (Immigration and Customs Enforcement), saying "fuck ICE" during her remarks. She also wore an "ICE Out" pin on the red carpet, aligning with broader artist activism against the agency's recent controversial actions.
